name: Salmon & Rice Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients except the soup and water.
2. Roll the mixture into small balls and place them in a shallow baking pan.
3. Cover the balls with the soup and water mixture.
4. Bake for 30 minutes at 350°F (180°C).
From: Cooking Alaskan by Alaskans. Alaska Northwest Publishing Co. 1983 ISBN 0-88240-237-4. Shared by Deidre Ganopole
